quoteFirst: We continued our vigilance the next day, though we had no particular reason to think it necessary; but
quoteTime: about ten o’clock in the morning
quoteLast: , Tomio came running to the tents, with a mixture of grief and fear in her countenance, and taking Mr. Banks, to whom they applied in every emergency and distress, by the arm, intimated that Tubourai Tamaide was dying, in consequence of something which our people had given him to eat, and that he must instantly go with her to his house.
title: The Three Voyages of Captain Cook Round the World. Vol. I. Being the First of the First Voyage.
author: Cook, James, 1728-1779; Banks, Joseph, 1743-1820 [Contributor]; Hawkesworth, John, 1715?-1773 [Editor]

quoteLast: , a messenger came from Tabora, asking us if we were not going to assist them against Mirambo.
title: How I found Livingstone
author: Stanley, Henry M. (Henry Morton), 1841-1904

quoteLast: I got a message from General McClernand, telling me where he could be found, and asking me what we were waiting for.
title: Memoirs of General William T. Sherman — Complete
author: Sherman, William T. (William Tecumseh), 1820-1891

quoteTime: About ten o’clock in the morning
quoteLast: we came to Prince-town, which is situated in a plain.
title: Travels into North America, Volume 1 (of 3)
author: Kalm, Pehr, 1716-1779; Forster, Johann Reinhold, 1729-1798 [Translator]

quoteFirst: 148 165 The Royal George, of 108 guns, whilst undergoing a partial careening at Spithead, was overset
title:
The Golden Treasury
Selected from the Best Songs and Lyrical Poems in the English Language and arranged with Notes
author: Palgrave, Francis Turner, 1824-1897 [Editor]

quoteFirst: The Prussian Guards coming up from Villers Cernay
quoteLast: planted their formidable batteries so as to sweep the Bois de Garenne and the ground about the Calvaire d'Illy from the eastward; and about that time the guns of the 5th and 11th German corps, that had early crossed the Meuse below Sedan, were brought to bear on the west front of that part of the French position.
title: The Development of the European Nations, 1870-1914 (5th ed.)
author: Rose, J. Holland (John Holland), 1855-1942

quoteLast: and it was about three in the afternoon that we were informed that the celebrated haunted house was close by.
title:
Indian Ghost Stories
Second Edition
author: Mukerji, S.

quoteTime: About ten o'clock in the morning
quoteLast: the enemy joined a fresh force, and we were compelled to halt.
title: In the Russian Ranks: A Soldier's Account of the Fighting in Poland
